business_ideas.idea: Arsenic: Playboy for Snapchat generation with model takeovers.
OnlyFans-style cam girl platform (Patreon for adult content).
Vice Ventures: VC fund for controversial/sin businesses (sex, drugs, alcohol).
Create Arsenic clones for niche genres (college, different categories).
HQ Trivia format on Twitch/YouTube instead of standalone app.
Educational afterschool trivia game subscription for kids.
Allowance tracking app with chore automation for kids.
DIY perfume kit marketplace; home-brew communities exist.
DIY soap kits for home crafting.
DIY juice kits and home juicing supplies.
Niche auction marketplaces (coins, comics, wine, posters).
Business auction marketplace for selling/flipping businesses.
Storage unit blind auctions (mystery box concept).
Classic car auctions at scale (Bring a Trailer model).
Notion template and theme app store/marketplace.

predictions.text: OnlyFans likely doing 100M+ in subscription revenue annually.
HQ Trivia format was a fad that inevitably died due to hype cycles.
DIY crafting communities (perfume, soap, juice) show strong demand.
Mobile-first niche auction platforms could crush heritage auctions.
OnlyFans will make more money long-term than Substack.
